5005.issue: [S5005] Plain setTimeout() found in source files (main.js). Please use this.setTimeout() or adapter.setTimeout() instead.

5023.issue: [S5023] "package-lock.json" not found in repo! Please consider to commit it to github repository.

5047.issue: [W5047] "admin/index_m.html" is most likely outdated since jsonConfig is used. Please consider removing it.

5050.issue: [E5050] process.exit() used in  (main.js). This is incompatible with compact mode as it terminates the entire host process. Remove process.exit() or set common.compact to false at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.dwd/blob/master/io-package.json).

5063.issue: [W5063] JSON formatting in "admin/jsonConfig.json" is hard to read (mixed indentation). Please use consistent indentation and proper line breaks.

5512.issue: [W5512] admin/jsonConfig.json schema validation error: Missing required property "i18n" in root

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

5619.issue: [S5619] "admin/jsonConfig.json" does not specify the "i18n" attribute. It defaults to true, which may be unintentional. Please explicitly add "i18n": true, "i18n": false, or a custom path.

6015.issue: [E6015] [README.md](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.dwd/blob/master/README.md) must use English language only but appears to contain German text (detected: "lädt die Wetterwarnungen"). Please remove or translate.

8906.issue: [S8906] Some Dependabot entries ("github-actions", "npm") use "schedule: interval: monthly". Consider migrating to random cron schedule ("schedule: interval: cron") for load distribution.

8915.issue: [W8915] Dependabot npm entry (directory: "/") has no "cooldown" configured. A cooldown of at least 7 days (e.g. "cooldown: { default: 7 }") is recommended to reduce supply chain risk.

8918.issue: [W8918] Workflow "automerge-dependabot.yml" references ioBroker action "iobroker-bot-orga/action-automerge-dependabot@main" with non-versioned ref "@main". Please use a versioned tag like "@v1".

0087.issue: [S0087] Missing "/tsconfig.json". Consider adding it for proper type checking (see ioBroker.examples for examples).
